title: Containerfile docs
body: I have been looking for documentation on the instruction set allowed in `Containerfile`. Without success. I think this information should be easily accessible form the podman docs landing page at https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/index.html via one click on a descriptive link.

comments.body: We do provide https://github.com/containers/common/blob/main/docs/Containerfile.5.md so this should just be a matter of linking it somewhere in the main docs page.

The docs.podman.io source is found in docs/source if anyone want to add the link there somewhere, note the common repo moved, the new link must be https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/common/docs/Containerfile.5.md instead
It is great to see the link added to the introduction. However, I do believe there should eventually be a link to the containerfile docs from the Contents section on the docs landing page.
